title: Purification of lysosomes using dextran-conjugated SPIONs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"qdir","text":"This method describes the usage of dextran-conjugated superparamagnetic iron nanoparticles (SPIONs) to purify a lysosome fraction from cultured cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
